20.reason: This should be else if to avoid falling through to the else below when the first condition is true but the second is false

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  This if should be an "else if" to avoid falling through to the else when previous conditions were true.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  This should be "else if" to prevent multiple branches; otherwise, the later 'else' may execute incorrectly.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.2 , reason:  Changed 'if' to 'else if' to form a proper if-else chain. The original independent 'if' statements caused the final 'else' to only apply to the lowercase check, incorrectly printing '-' after valid uppercase/digit expansions.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.1111111111111111 , reason:  Should be 'else if' to form a mutually exclusive chain, otherwise the final 'else' incorrectly binds only to the lowercase check.

28.reason: This should be else if to avoid falling through to the else below when the first or second condition is true but the third is false

36.reason: [This else is attached only to the last if, so when the first or second if condition is true but the third is false, the else executes incorrectly, printing '-' instead of skipping. It should be restructured to handle cases where no expansion is valid.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This else is attached only to the last if, so when the first or second if condition is true but the third is false, the else executes incorrectly, printing '-' instead of skipping. It should be restructured to handle cases where no expansion is valid.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  This else is attached only to the last if (lowercase). It will execute whenever the lowercase condition fails, even if an earlier condition (uppercase or digit) succeeded, causing an unwanted dash to be printed.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.1111111111111111 , reason:  This 'else' currently only attaches to the lowercase 'if'; chaining previous 'if's with 'else if' fixes the logic so it only prints '-' when no valid expansion occurs.

37.reason: The 'else' only applies to the last 'if' (lowercase), so if the '-' is between uppercase or digits but doesn't meet condition, it incorrectly prints '-' even when it shouldn't (e.g., in "B-F", after processing uppercase block, the 'else' is skipped, but if lowercase condition fails, it prints '-', causing wrong output like 'BCDE-F' instead of 'BCDEF')

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  The 'else' only applies to the last 'if' (lowercase), so if the '-' is between uppercase or digits but doesn't meet condition, it incorrectly prints '-' even when it shouldn't (e.g., in "B-F", after processing uppercase block, the 'else' is skipped, but if lowercase condition fails, it prints '-', causing wrong output like 'BCDE-F' instead of 'BCDEF')
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  The 'else' only applies to the last 'if' (lowercase), not all three type checks. So if the '-' is between uppercase or digits but doesn't meet expansion criteria, it incorrectly prints '-' even when it shouldn't (e.g., in "B-F", after processing uppercase block, the lowercase condition fails and triggers else).
